title: polygala pseudoalpestris
intro: Polygala pseudoalpestris, also known as Rocky Mountain polygala or Yellow milkwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the milkwort family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Polygala pseudoalpestris include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its roots are sometimes used in traditional Chinese medicine.
